name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M12635 Embossed】This compact Victor wallet is made of Monogram Shadow calfskin, adorned with delicate Monogram embossed patterns, exuding a 'low-key luxury' temperament. The interior features a practical divider, a zippered pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flip cover features a snap button design and is adorned with the Louis Vuitton logo. 11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
